test.notes: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or the root package.json, and this mission's AGENTS.md defines validation as build plus lint rather than a separate test suite.

typecheck.notes: Per mission AGENTS.md, root type checking is validated through the build pipeline instead of a standalone tsc command. `turbo run build` completed successfully during this validation run.

lint.notes: Lint exited 0 with warnings only: 37 in @documenso/lib, 17 in @documenso/ui, and 7 in @documenso/trpc. No lint errors blocked this milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit note that Map-based replacements for `.find()` inside loops can change duplicate-key behavior from first-match to last-wins. Workers should either prove duplicates cannot occur or preserve first-match semantics intentionally.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The js-map-lookups review found packages/lib/server-only/pdf/generate-certificate-pdf.ts:61 replaced `fields.find(...)` with a `Map`, which now returns the last duplicate `recipientId` entry rather than the first match the original code would have used.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When requesting `.filter().map()` consolidation, distinguish eligible data-transformation chains from JSX-rendering chains that should usually stay unchanged for readability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The js-combine-iterations review found the worker had to separate data-transformation chains from JSX-rendering cases, ultimately converting 14 eligible files while intentionally leaving JSX chains such as apps/remix/app/components/dialogs/envelope-redistribute-dialog.tsx untouched.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce that narrowly scoped refactors should avoid incidental formatter-only or Tailwind class-order churn, or revert that noise before commit so scrutiny diffs stay focused.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The js-combine-iterations review found unrelated Tailwind class-order changes in apps/remix/app/components/general/document/document-recipient-link-copy-dialog.tsx, packages/ui/components/document/document-global-auth-action-select.tsx, and packages/ui/components/recipient/recipient-action-auth-select.tsx. A similar review-noise issue was already reported in the rerender-and-rendering scrutiny synthesis, making this a recurring pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the lint-baseline wording with the actual expectation for the final gate: lint currently exits 0 with warnings only, not with '4 pre-existing errors'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The cross-area-build-lint-check review compared mission AGENTS.md and validation-contract.md against the worker handoff and found the current final-gate lint result is 0 errors with warnings only (@documenso/lib 37, @documenso/ui 17, @documenso/trpc 7).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Assign verification-only milestone gate features to a validation-oriented skill, or explicitly document in perf-refactor-worker that some features are evidence-only and require no code edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The cross-area-build-lint-check review found features.json assigns the verification-only final gate to `perf-refactor-worker`, while the worker appropriately only ran build/lint/status verification without editing code.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the nullable-key sentinel pattern (`Map.get(id ?? -1)`) as the preferred way to translate nullable IDs into Map lookups during refactors.
